name: drafts
description: Confirm a pending email draft so it becomes eligible for sending.

tools.name: confirm_draft
tools.description: Flip a draft's status from 'pending' to 'confirmed'. Call this AFTER the user has explicitly confirmed (e.g. said 'yes', 'send', 'confirmed') the preview you presented via finish. After confirm_draft succeeds, call send_email or reply_email with the same draft_id to actually send.

draft_id.description: ID of the pending draft to confirm (returned by draft_email).
